repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3: PartialID catalogue empty; pid_dose_response_shape_v1 only covers monotone-concave marginal dose-response shape closure without IV or rank coupling

published_prior_art.cite: FanGuerreZhu2017 + FirpoRidder2019: finite joint-potential-outcome partial-ID bounds; BaitairianSebastienJreichKatsahianGuilloux2025: sharp continuous-treatment APO bounds

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3: no continuous-dose IV/sensitivity rank-copula slope proposal; pid_dose_response_shape_v1 lacks IV and baseline-rank-slice target
doc/API.md §3 and pid_dose_response_shape_v1: no copula-radius phase transition or adjacent-rank sign threshold
pid_dose_response_shape_v1: no-tube/rank-copula reduction absent; only marginal shape-closure reductions

novelty_flags.label: Related work / Kasy2014
novelty_flags.one_line: The proposal says Kasy2014 proves point identification under rich support with unrestricted heterogeneity, but the 2017 corrigendum qualifies the central claim; the comparison should cite and state that caveat.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters / Assumption copula-tube / Conjectures 1-2
soundness_flags.one_line: The rank coordinate U_a=F_{a,X}(Y(a)) and copula C_{01,x} require continuous conditional outcome margins or a randomized/tie-broken rank; bounded Y alone permits atoms, so the copula tube is not fully well-defined.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a conditional-continuity or randomized-rank assumption for Y(a)|X and propagate it through the locked block, setup, copula-tube assumption, and sanity corollaries.
Repair the Kasy comparison by citing the corrigendum and narrowing the claim to the assumptions under which the continuous-IV identification result is valid.
Add a two-by-two witness table template in §10 with symbolic margins and the copula-radius inequality that should force the sign crossing.
Add a related-work sentence on average derivative effect estimands for continuous treatments to separate the derivative target from standard dose-response-curve targets.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal to make ranks/copulas well-defined under atoms and correct the Kasy prior-art comparison; the novelty kernel otherwise survives at field tier.
